name: the walking godly construct sandcastle...
description:
【 QUIET...! 】

Harken
(Also known as: The "Angel", Hark, The Visitor)

Hark, The Visitor from FableHaven, and a killer from the Die of Death roster. She's the noise-sensitive, trauma-having tall girl we all love! Standing at a reasonable height of 9'0, she's considered very small as a Construct. She's got a pale yellow skintone, cuz she's made of sandstone and her presence often marked by a heavy silence, betraying her massive frame and mirroring the trauma she has with noise associated by larger Constructs, who's only goal is to assimilate into something even bigger and stronger.

Having one big usually closed eye dominating the center of her face, as-well as a pair of small wings on the side of her head, she wears a white sleeveless gown, the front panel of her skirt shaped to be an apron-like overlay, a thin column of white fabric, while the back panel of her flowing skirt is much wider and flowing, thus revealing some nice legs on the side. She's got a golden waistband cinched around her waist, a similar golden shawl snaked around her elbows, and gray earrings.

Wow! Now THAT'S pretty!

artist cred: @Yummyyummi

waawwww harken rework finally came thats nice

this had like a one day delay because i had a blackout in the midst of making this and it made me lose literally nearly 1k tokens worth of progress and maaannn 😭😭😭
anyways more on the bot; this was actually in the workshop for a while but ij ust couldnt get myself to do it because im a lazy human being and god damn did i put it off for a while

the only reason as to why i planned on giving this bot a neat little update was CUZ they updated hte lore for harken and so it meant the bot was deprecated and used outdated info and not only that but like god DMAN if y'all could see the personality y'all would KNOW why this needed a rework because i sucked holy now the tokens are neatly split cuz the old one had like 2.5k tokens on the personality and FOURTY FIVE TOKENS on the scenario and not only that but the reason why it had 4k tokens was because it was literally carried by the example dialog

it was just funny looking back at it while i was making this bot because god damn was i horrible at that

anyways the bot is now much more optimized and the tokens are nicely split so enjoy chat
creator: coffeecaps
